Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Winter Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The horned man asks who is backing the Skysworn, suggesting the Winter Sage.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Winter Sage is furious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Winter Sage is the Sage of the Frozen Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Winter Sage brought the Blackflame Empire team back.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Winter Sage chose Yerin as a pupil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage has long white hair and spoke to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage is a woman who found Yerin and moved her to the Iron guest housing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage is a Sage who provides training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage is a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage is a symbol of ice and cold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage also reflects the Sword Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage is a character who expressed fury and disgust regarding the parasite within Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Winter Sage once fought a battle against the Herald of the Tidewalker Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Winter Sage told Yerin that the Remnant had become something else over time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Winter Sage wants Yerin to become a symbol of swordsmanship to get closer to the Sword Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Winter Sage is described as not being tolerant and currently distracted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Winter Sage left advancement resources for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is training with the Winter Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Winter Sage predicted Calan Archer would move behind Yerin using a spatial transfer artifact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Winter Sage intends to seal the thing inside Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Winter Sage expressed relief that the hosts should have warned them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Winter Sage is one of the Sages guiding Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Winter Sage shoved the Blood Sage away from Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Winter Sage uses raw strength and sword skill instead of techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The Winter Sage is present during the training discussion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The Winter Sage trained against Yerin and her Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Winter Sage whispered congratulations to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Winter Sage believes an Icon is a connection to greater power and a state of mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Winter Sage is pinning Yerin in place.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Winter Sage might be able to fix the sword.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Winter Sage is depicted in a portrait within the Sword Sage's void space.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Winter Sage is a teacher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Winter Sage is a combatant who stands on a levitating sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Winter Sage was cloaked in a hailstorm of razor-sharp ice and wore a halo matching her white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Winter Sage was shuddering.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Winter Sage is at Charity's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — The Winter Sage fights in the snow-capped passage on top of Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Winter Sage is known for precisely timed attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Winter Sage is a weeping entity that flew out of Lindon's void key.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
